update:
Weather alerts endpoint generally available 
 The weather alerts endpoint is now generally available. The endpoint returns
weather alerts occurring in real time for a given latitude and longitude. For
more information, see  Get weather alerts .

Weather API is generally available 
 Announcing the General Availability (GA) release of the Weather API. See the  Release Notes  for information about this release and for all other releases. 
 If you are a new user, see  Set up your Google Cloud project  to start the installation process.

Weather API in Preview 
 The Weather API is now available in Preview. With the Weather API, you can request information about current weather conditions, daily weather forecasts, hourly weather forecasts, and hourly weather history for a given location. For more information, see  Weather API Overview .
